summary: Frontend refactor Batch F1 testing completed successfully. PlasiyerDashboardShell.jsx created, PlasiyerDashboard.js acts as compatibility entry, sidebar simplified to 7 items. All features working correctly with no UI regressions.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in OrdersPage render method - minor React warning, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: PlasiyerDashboard.js correctly acts as compatibility entry importing PlasiyerDashboardShell
App.js import path unchanged - maintains backward compatibility
Sidebar items correctly reduced from previous count to exactly 7 items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactor Batch F1 verified. Key findings: 1) PlasiyerDashboard.js is now a 5-line compatibility entry that imports and returns <PlasiyerDashboardShell />. 2) PlasiyerDashboardShell.jsx contains all dashboard logic (509 lines). 3) Sidebar has exactly 7 items: Ana Sayfa, Smart Orders, Musteriler, Siparisler (with badge showing 3), Stok, Teslimatlar, Kampanyalar. 4) Removed items confirmed NOT present: Rut, Teslimat Olustur, Create, Analizler, Iade Talepleri. 5) All navigation works correctly - each sidebar item loads its respective page without errors. 6) Login with sf_plasiyer/plasiyer123 works correctly. 7) App.js still imports PlasiyerDashboard from './pages/PlasiyerDashboard' - no route/import changes needed.
